channel.title: Matching-Engine on Coding Life
channel.description: Recent content in Matching-Engine on Coding Life

item.title: Next-Generation Matching Engine: A Message-Driven Parallel Matching Engine
item.description: Centralized exchanges rely on a CLOB, or central limit order book, for matching. The matching rules are simple: price priority first, time priority second. For an exchange, the matching engine is foundational infrastructure. It must be stable, efficient, scalable, and fault-tolerant, and it must be able to recover or roll back quickly during extreme market conditions or system failures.
